case_title: OSCAR MINOR VS. YARK HAR LEE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, YARK HAR DBA BUDGET CLEANERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF OSCAR MINOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUDGET CLEANERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY YARK HAR LEE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER AJDONG NI. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $50.00 FILED BY MINOR, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, YARK HAR DBA BUDGET CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINOR, OSCAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINOR, OSCAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, YARK HAR DBA BUDGET CLEANERS AN EXAMINATION OF THE TROUSERS SHOWS THAT DEFENDANT ALTERED THEM. ALTHOUGH THE ALTERATIONS WERE NOT ALL THAT PLAINTIFF HOPED, DEFENDANT PERFORMED VALUABLE WORK. I CREDIT DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT THE PANTS COULD NOT HAVE BEEN ADJUSTED AS PLAINTIFF WANTED AND THAT SHE TOLD PLAINTIFF THAT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
